### MergeRoadmap

>  MergeRoadmap (id:str, source_symbols:List[str], target_symbol:str,
>                    target_location:str,
>                    signature_changes:Dict[str,str]=<factory>,
>                    dependents:List[__main__.DependentInfo]=<factory>,
>                    steps:List[str]=<factory>, risk_level:str='medium',
>                    breaking_changes:List[str]=<factory>)

*Step-by-step plan to merge duplicates.*

### find_functional_duplicates

>  find_functional_duplicates
>                                  (graph:nbdev_mcp.utils.depgraph.DependencyGra
>                                  ph, min_similarity:float=0.8)

*Find symbols with identical/similar behavior but different names.*

Uses AST hash comparison and structural similarity.

### find_named_duplicates

>  find_named_duplicates (graph:nbdev_mcp.utils.depgraph.DependencyGraph)

*Find symbols with same/similar names across modules.*

Detects: - Exact name matches in different modules - Private/public
pairs (\_name, name) - Near-matches (edit distance \<= 2) - Common
prefix/suffix variants (get_foo, fetch_foo)

<table>
<thead>
<tr>
<th></th>
<th><strong>Type</strong></th>
<th><strong>Details</strong></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>graph</td>
<td>DependencyGraph</td>
<td>The dependency graph to analyze.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Returns</strong></td>
<td><strong>List</strong></td>
<td><strong>Groups of similarly named symbols.</strong></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

### find_semantic_duplicates

>  find_semantic_duplicates (graph:nbdev_mcp.utils.depgraph.DependencyGraph,
>                                min_similarity:float=0.85, model_name:str='all-
>                                MiniLM-L6-v2')

*Find symbols with similar purpose using embeddings.*

WARNING: This is expensive and should only be run with user
confirmation. Uses local embeddings with MPS/CUDA acceleration when
available.

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 6%" />

</tr>

<tr>
<td>graph</td>
<td>DependencyGraph</td>
<td></td>
<td>The dependency graph to analyze.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>min_similarity</td>
<td>float</td>
<td>0.85</td>
<td>Minimum cosine similarity threshold.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>model_name</td>
<td>str</td>
<td>all-MiniLM-L6-v2</td>

</tr>

<td><strong>List</strong></td>

### find_all_duplicates

>  find_all_duplicates (project:Optional[str]=None,
>                           include_functional:bool=True,
>                           include_named:bool=True,
>                           include_semantic:bool=False,
>                           min_similarity:float=0.8)

*Find all duplicate symbols in a project.*

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 6%" />
<col style="width: 25%" />
<col style="width: 34%" />
<col style="width: 34%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th></th>
<th><strong>Type</strong></th>
<th><strong>Default</strong></th>
<th><strong>Details</strong></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>project</td>
<td>Optional</td>
<td>None</td>
<td>Project path or alias.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>include_functional</td>
<td>bool</td>
<td>True</td>
<td>Include functionally duplicate code.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>include_named</td>
<td>bool</td>
<td>True</td>
<td>Include similarly named symbols.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>include_semantic</td>
<td>bool</td>
<td>False</td>
<td>Include semantically similar code (EXPENSIVE).</td>
</tr>
<tr>

<td>float</td>
<td>0.8</td>
<td>Minimum similarity threshold.</td>
</tr>

<td><strong>Returns</strong></td>
<td><strong>Dict</strong></td>
<td></td>
